messages.text: My name is Vasamalli, I speak Toda, consent is researcher

Welcome, Vasamalli! It's an honor to be able to document your stories and preserve the beautiful Toda language.

Before we begin, could you please confirm your approximate age? This information helps us understand the context of your life experiences and the language as it was spoken during your lifetime. All of this will be kept confidential according to the 'researcher' consent level you've provided.
I grew up in the Nilgiri Hills with buffaloes

Thank you, Vasamalli. The Nilgiri Hills are a truly special place. It's wonderful that you have such a deep connection to the buffaloes there.

To start our conversation, could you tell me a bit about your childhood? What are some of your earliest memories of growing up in the Nilgiri Hills?
Do you remember my name and what I told you?
I'm here and listening. Please continue.
My name is Vasamalli, I speak Toda, consent is researcher

I grew up in the Nilgiri Hills with buffaloes
